title: senecio ramentaceus
intro: Senecio ramentaceus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio ramentaceus include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Senecio ramentaceus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
